name: Gestodene
description: Gestodene is a progestogen hormonal contraceptive. Products containing gestoden include Meliane, which contains 20 mcg of ethinylestradiol and 75 mcg of gestodene; and Gynera, which contains 30 mcg of ethinylestradiol and 75 mcg of gestodene.

interactions.name: Bosutinib
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Bosutinib can be increased when it is combined with Gestodene.

interactions.name: Ibrutinib
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ibrutinib can be increased when it is combined with Gestodene.

interactions.name: Tolvaptan
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Tolvaptan can be increased when it is combined with Gestodene.

interactions.name: Griseofulvin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Gestodene can be decreased when it is combined with Griseofulvin.

interactions.name: Tranexamic Acid
interactions.description: Tranexamic Acid may increase the thrombogenic activities of Gestodene.

interactions.name: Ulipristal
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Gestodene can be decreased when used in combination with Ulipristal.
